constraints: SLA aging thresholds must be defined as named constants (not magic numbers inline): needs_clinical_review=4h yellow, under_clinical_review=8h yellow, outreach_pending_approval=2h yellow, pending_facility_response=24h yellow/48h red, declined_retry_needed=8h red
SLA flags must be computed at query time from current wall-clock time minus the timestamp the case entered its current status; they must never be stored as a column on PatientCase
All queries must filter by organization_id from request.state — using the same organization_id as in the JWT app_metadata; do not accept organization_id as a user-supplied query parameter
analytics-module is read-only; it must perform no INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE operations on any table
Role gate (manager or admin) must execute before any database query; 403 must be returned without touching the database for unauthorized callers
All four endpoints must support pagination (page + page_size) and return total_count in every paginated response; no endpoint should return an unbounded result set
Date range defaults: if date_from is not supplied, default to 30 days before today; if date_to is not supplied, default to today; enforce date_from <= date_to and return 400 if violated
Placement rate is computed as: count(cases where outcome_type='placed') / count(all cases in date range) * 100; division by zero returns 0.0
